basic_details.job_title: NCBS Scientific Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS) has released the official Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 7/2026 at the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NCBS Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a full-time B.V.Sc. degree with at least 60% marks from a recognized university/institute, 2 years of relevant experience, and proficiency in computer applications, aged up to 31 years, can apply online on or before 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online applicat

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 31 years (as on 01-01-2026) OBC relaxation included in maximum age limit.

qualification.education_qualification: Full Time B.V.Sc. with 60% marks from recognized university/institute, 2 years experience in relevant field, Proficient in using personal computers and its applications
qualification.details: Full Time B.V.Sc. with aggregate of 60% marks from a recognized university/institute. 2 years experience in relevant field. Proficient in using personal computers and its applications.

salary_details.details: Level 10 (stage-1) Basic Pay: Rs. 56,100/- + allowances as per Central Government norms

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Job Oriented Practical Test Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download NCBS Scientific Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCBS Scientific Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NCBS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NCBS Scientific Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCBS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCBS Scientific Office Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCBS Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the NCBS Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) post is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Full Time B.V.Sc. with at least 60% marks from a recognized university/institute, along with 2 years of relevant experience and computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 31 years as of 1st January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) post at the National Centre for Biological Sciences (NCBS).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, which is at Level 10 (stage-1) of the pay matrix, plus applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 1000/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the NCBS Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, Job Oriented Practical Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories, and OBC relaxation is specifically mentioned as included in the maximum age limit.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the NCBS Scientific Officer 'C' (Veterinarian) post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official NCBS website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article, which will provide all the detailed information.
